name: EURES
sectors_tags: all sectors; cross-border; relocation support; free
notes: European Commission's official job-mobility portal; ~3M vacancies across all EU + Iceland/Liechtenstein/Norway/Switzerland; includes the EU Talent Pool pilot for non-EU candidates

name: LinkedIn
rss_status: none - public job RSS discontinued (API/scraping only)
sectors_tags: all sectors; networking; executive; passive recruiting
notes: Dominant professional network in Europe; strongest channel for professional/executive roles

name: Indeed
rss_status: none - public RSS discontinued ~2019 (Publisher API, now also winding down)
notes: Largest aggregator; localized country domains (fr.indeed.com, de.indeed.com, es.indeed.com, it.indeed.com, etc.) in ~28 European markets

name: Glassdoor
notes: Listings plus company reviews and salary data; owned by Indeed/Recruit; shares postings with Indeed

name: StepStone
notes: The Stepstone Group; strongest in Germany (stepstone.de), Austria, Belgium; major continental player

name: Monster
notes: Country domains (.de, .fr, .es, .it, .se, .fi, etc.); declining vs LinkedIn/Indeed but still widely used

name: EuroJobs
notes: Listings across many European countries; filterable by country/industry/level

name: JobsinNetwork
notes: Network of city/expat sites (JobsinBerlin, JobsinAmsterdam, JobsinBrussels, etc.)
